title: Al Abraq Heat Wave
lead: Al Abraq is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.11. The event has reached a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Al Abraq has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 13.4 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 22%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is at 37.3 km/h. 
 These conditions are expected to persist, with no heating degree days (HDD) recorded, indicating no relief from the heat.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
